name: Chocolate-Glazed Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brush two 9-inch layer cake pans or a 13x9-inch baking pan with shortening, then dust with all-purpose flour.
2. Sift cake flour with baking powder and set aside.
3. Cream butter with sugar in a large mixer bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Beat eggs on medium speed for 5 minutes, scraping the bowl down several times.
5. Reduce mixer speed to low, beat in bananas and buttermilk.
6. Add dry ingredients all at once, mixing only to moisten the dry ingredients.
7. Spoon batter into prepared pans and bake on the middle shelf of a 350 degree oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool for 5 minutes in the pans, then turn onto a rack to finish cooling.
9. For best results, wrap cooled layers in film and ripen overnight before serving.
10. Frost with Chocolate Glaze or serve plain.
Chocolate Glaze:
1. Sift powdered sugar with cocoa powder until combined.
2. Set aside.
3. Melt chocolate over simmering water in a double boiler, or in the microwave oven on HIGH (100% power) for 1 minute.
4. Remove from heat, stir boiling water into melted chocolate to make a smooth paste.
5. Stir in sugar-cocoa mixture and spread evenly while warm over cake layers.
